headlines.headline: Red Sox enter matchup with the Brewers on losing streak
headlines.description: Milwaukee Brewers (8-2) vs. Boston Red Sox (2-8)

headlines.headline: 2026 MLB ABS challenge system tracker: Team, player rankings
headlines.description: The ABS challenge system leaderboard ranks batters, pitchers, catchers, teams and umpires throughout the MLB season.

headlines.headline: Red Sox's Contreras left fuming after latest Brewers HBP
headlines.description: Willson Contreras had a warning for the Brewers after he was hit by a pitch for the 24th time by the team Monday. "... Next time they hit me again, I'm going to take one of them out. That's a message."
